consentText.required: I agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy, including Emmaline's handling of call audio, transcripts, notes, uploaded documents, and AI processing.
consentText.marketing: I agree to receive the educational newsletter and product updates from Emmaline. I can unsubscribe at any time.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
intro: Emmaline is a product of Planting Moon LLC, located at 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609.
This Privacy Policy explains how Emmaline collects, uses, stores, and shares information when you use the Emmaline mobile app, website, and related services.
Emmaline is a voice-first AI assistant. That means some of the information you share with us may include voice audio, transcripts, notes, uploaded documents, and support messages.

sections.title: Information We Collect
body: We collect account details you provide directly, such as your email address, password, marketing preferences, and support messages.
When you use voice and reader features, we may collect call audio, call metadata, transcripts, summaries, notes, uploaded text or PDF content, and usage records tied to your account.
bullets: Account information such as email address and authentication details
Call audio, call timestamps, phone assignment metadata, transcripts, summaries, and note content
Reader uploads and pasted text you ask Emmaline to read or process
Support form submissions, deletion requests, and consent records
Device and request metadata needed for security, fraud prevention, and service operations

sections.title: How We Use Information
body: We use information to provide the service, authenticate users, power voice calls, generate transcripts and summaries, respond to support requests, manage subscriptions if offered, and improve reliability.
We do not currently use third-party advertising networks inside the app or website.
bullets: Deliver voice, transcript, note, reader, and account features
Process AI-generated responses, summaries, and speech features
Send operational emails such as support replies or account notices
Send optional newsletters and product updates only if you opt in
Maintain security, prevent abuse, and investigate service issues

sections.title: Permissions and Sensitive Features
body: The app requests microphone access so you can place in-app voice calls and record Listen Mode sessions. The app only accesses the microphone after your device-level permission prompt and your in-app action.
If you import documents or create support requests, the app only sends that content when you explicitly choose to upload or submit it.
bullets: Microphone permission for voice calling and recorded speech features
Document picker access only when you choose to import a file
No background phone monitoring or third-party ad tracking

sections.title: Third-Party Services
body: We use third-party infrastructure providers to operate Emmaline. These providers process data on our behalf to deliver specific parts of the service.
Your use of Emmaline may involve the services listed below depending on which features you use.
bullets: Twilio for voice calling and phone infrastructure
OpenAI for transcription, summarization, and AI response generation
Google Cloud for some speech recognition and text-to-speech features
Supabase for application data storage and account-related records
Resend for support and waitlist or newsletter-related email delivery when configured

sections.title: Retention
body: We keep information for as long as needed to operate the service, meet legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce agreements.
If you delete your account, we will remove or de-identify account-linked data from active systems, subject to backup, fraud-prevention, or legal retention needs.
bullets: Account and consent records are retained for compliance and audit purposes
Call, transcript, note, and reader content are retained until you delete them or your account is deleted, unless a shorter retention rule is introduced
Support requests may be retained to resolve the issue and document outcomes

sections.title: Your Choices and Rights
body: You can review the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use inside the app and on the website.
You can contact us to request account access, export help, correction help, or deletion support. We also provide an in-app account deletion path for authenticated users.
bullets: Access and review your account information in the app
Request support, deletion, or account-data help at support@emmaline.app
Unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time
Request account-data access or export support through our support channel

sections.title: Children's Privacy
body: Emmaline is not directed to children under 13, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
If you believe a child under 13 has provided personal information to Emmaline, contact support@emmaline.app so we can investigate and remove the information if appropriate.

sections.title: Contact Us
body: For privacy questions, deletion requests, export requests, or support, contact support@emmaline.app.

termsOfService.title: Terms of Use
intro: Emmaline is a product of Planting Moon LLC, located at 5830 E 2nd St, Ste 7000 #35119, Casper, Wyoming 82609.
These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the Emmaline app, website, and related services.
By creating an account or using Emmaline, you agree to these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Eligibility and Accounts
body: You are responsible for the accuracy of your account information and for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
You may not use Emmaline in violation of law, to infringe the rights of others, or to submit harmful, fraudulent, or abusive content.

sections.title: Service Description
body: Emmaline offers voice-assisted AI features including calling, transcription, summaries, notes, reader tools, and related account services.
Some outputs are generated by AI systems and may be incomplete, inaccurate, or unsuitable for high-risk decisions. You are responsible for reviewing and using outputs appropriately.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
body: You agree not to misuse Emmaline, interfere with the service, reverse engineer restricted components, attempt unauthorized access, or use the service to violate the privacy or rights of others.
bullets: Do not use the service for unlawful harassment, fraud, or abuse
Do not attempt to access another user's data or account
Do not upload content you do not have permission to use

sections.title: Subscriptions and Billing
body: If Emmaline offers paid subscriptions, those subscriptions may be purchased through the Apple App Store, Google Play, or subscription infrastructure providers that support our app billing operations.

Subscriptions renew automatically unless canceled before the renewal date. You can manage or cancel subscriptions through the platform where you purchased them. If restore purchases is available in the app, you should use it when changing devices or reinstalling the app.
bullets: Charges are billed in advance according to the plan shown at purchase
Trials, promotional pricing, and entitlements may change or end according to the offer terms
Refund requests are generally handled by the app store or billing platform used for the purchase
We may use a provider such as RevenueCat to manage subscription state, restore entitlements, and synchronize billing events

sections.title: Account Management and Deletion
body: You may request deletion of your Emmaline account through the in-app settings flow or by contacting support@emmaline.app.
Deleting your account may permanently remove access to transcripts, notes, reader history, and related data linked to the account.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
body: Emmaline and its service materials are owned by us or our licensors. Except for the rights granted to you to use the service, we reserve all rights not expressly granted.

sections.title: Disclaimers and Liability
body: Emmaline is provided on an as-is and as-available basis. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim warranties not expressly stated in these terms.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, Emmaline will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or for decisions made based on AI-generated outputs.

sections.title: Changes and Contact
body: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. If we make material changes, we may update the effective date and provide notice where required.
For terms, billing, support, or deletion questions, contact support@emmaline.app.
